NewDelhi, the l.3th May,20l3 .- - . - ^ 9f.1. 3!3(E)'- In exercise of the powers confened by clause (a) of secrion 22 ofrhe passports Act, 1967 ' (15 ofl967)' the central Govemment, being ofthe opinion that it is necessary anC expedient in the public interest so to do, hereby exempts Indians living in Saudi Arabia having no travel documents from the operition oitfre prouislon, of Section^S ofthe said Act, read with rule 8 ofthe Passports Rules, 1980, in so far as such provisions relate to the pal.ment offees for issue ofEmergency Certificate for one time travel to India subject to the following conditions, namely :- ' ' ' (a) waiver ofEmergency Certificate fees shall be applicable only for those Emergency Certificate applications Oi ; all applicants desirous to avail this waiver ofEmergency Certificate fee shall have to submit an additional application indicating their wish to avail this scheme: (c) save as otherwise provided in this notification, while issuing Emergency Cenificate during the operation of the scheme, all the relevant provisions ofPassport Act, Passport Rules and passport Mirual shall apply. lF ile N o.
